community.mongodb.mongodb_atlas_cluster.description: The clusters module provides access to your cluster configurations. The module lets you create, edit and delete clusters. L(API Documentation,https://docs.atlas.mongodb.com/reference/api/clusters/)

community.mongodb.mongodb_atlas_ldap_use.description: The mongodb_atlas_ldap_user module lets you create LDAP groups on the admin database by mapping LDAP groups to MongoDB roles on your Atlas databases. Each user or group has a set of roles that provide access to the project

community.mongodb.mongodb_atlas_user.description: The mongodb_atlas_user module lets you create, modify and delete the database users in your cluster. Each user has a set of roles that provide access to the project

community.mongodb.mongodb_atlas_whitelis.description: The mongodb_atlas_whitelist module manages a Atlas project

community.mongodb.mongodb_balancer.short_description: Manages the MongoDB Sharded Cluster Balancer.
community.mongodb.mongodb_balancer.description: Manages the MongoDB Sharded Cluster Balancer. Start or stop the balancer. Adjust the cluster chunksize. Enable or disable autosplit. Add or remove a balancer window.

community.mongodb.mongodb_index.short_description: Creates or drops indexes on MongoDB collections.
community.mongodb.mongodb_index.description: Creates or drops indexes on MongoDB collections. Supports multiple index options, i.e. unique, sparse and partial. Validates existence of indexes by name only.

community.mongodb.mongodb_maintenance.short_description: Enables or disables maintenance mode for a secondary member.
community.mongodb.mongodb_maintenance.description: Enables or disables maintenance mode for a secondary member. Wrapper around the replSetMaintenance command. Performs no actions against a PRIMARY member. When enabled SECONDARY members will not service reads.

community.mongodb.mongodb_oplog.description: Resizes the MongoDB oplog. This module should only be used with MongoDB 3.6 and above. Old MongoDB versions should use an alternative method. Consult U(https://docs.mongodb.com/manual/tutorial/change-oplog-size) for further info.

community.mongodb.mongodb_parameter.short_description: Change an administrative parameter on a MongoDB server
community.mongodb.mongodb_parameter.description: Change an administrative parameter on a MongoDB server.

community.mongodb.mongodb_replicaset.description: Initialises a MongoDB replicaset in a new deployment. Validates the replicaset name for existing deployments. Advanced replicaset member (re)configuration possible (see examples). Initialize the replicaset before adding users as per \ [best practice](https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/tutorial/deploy-replica-set-with-keyfile-access-control/).

community.mongodb.mongodb_role.short_description: Adds or removes a role from a MongoDB database
community.mongodb.mongodb_role.description: Adds or removes a role from a MongoDB database. For further information on the required format for \ the privileges, authenticationRestriction or roles \ parameters, see the MongoDB Documentation https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/command/createRole/

community.mongodb.mongodb_schema.description: Manages MongoDB Document Schema Validators. Create, update and remove Validators on a collection. Supports the entire range of jsonSchema keywords. See [jsonSchema Available Keywords](https://docs.mongodb.com/manual/reference/operator/query/jsonSchema/#available-keywords) for details.

community.mongodb.mongodb_shard.short_description: Add or remove shards from a MongoDB Cluster
community.mongodb.mongodb_shard.description: Add or remove shards from a MongoDB Cluster.

community.mongodb.mongodb_shard_tag.description: Manage Shard Tags.. Add and remove shard tags.

community.mongodb.mongodb_shard_zone.description: Manage Shard Zones. Add and remove shard zones.

community.mongodb.mongodb_shutdown.short_description: Cleans up all database resources and then terminates the mongod/mongos process.
community.mongodb.mongodb_shutdown.description: Cleans up all database resources and then terminates the process.

community.mongodb.mongodb_status.short_description: Validates the status of the replicaset.
community.mongodb.mongodb_status.description: Validates the status of the replicaset. The module expects all replicaset nodes to be PRIMARY, SECONDARY or ARBITER. Will wait until a timeout for the replicaset state to converge if required. Can also be used to lookup the current PRIMARY member (see examples).

community.mongodb.mongodb_stepdown.short_description: Step down the MongoDB node from a PRIMARY state.
community.mongodb.mongodb_stepdown.description: Step down the MongoDB node from the PRIMARY state if it has that status. Returns OK immediately if the member is already in the SECONDARY or ARBITER states. Will wait until a timeout for the member state to reach SECONDARY or PRIMARY, if the member state is currently STARTUP, RECOVERING, STARTUP2 or ROLLBACK, before taking any needed action.

community.mongodb.mongodb_user.short_description: Adds or removes a user from a MongoDB database
community.mongodb.mongodb_user.description: Adds or removes a user from a MongoDB database.
